description_long: This is an American football mounted upright on a roughly rectangular, white stone or marble base. The football is brown with a pebbled texture and features prominent white laces and printed logos, including the New York Jets team name and emblem. The ball is held in place by a small, black plastic or resin stand that is affixed to the base. The base itself has an irregular, chipped edge, giving it a rugged, natural appearance. The football appears to be a commemorative or display piece rather than a functional sports ball, as indicated by its mounting and presentation. The surface of the football is clean and shows minimal signs of wear, with all logos and markings clearly visible.
description: A brown, pebbled American football with New York Jets branding is mounted upright on a rugged white stone base, held by a black stand. The ball is clean and appears to be a display or commemorative item.
description_view_0: The front view shows the football's laces, the 'JETS' text, and the New York Jets logo clearly, with the ball centered on the white stone base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the oval Jets logo and the ball's curvature, with the black stand and base visible from an angle.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain, textured brown surface of the football, with no visible logos or laces, and the full width of the stone base.
description_view_3: This angled rear view shows the opposite side of the football, with partial visibility of the laces and some logo text, as well as the irregular edge of the base.
